ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot presenting a hamsa, expressing protection, good luck, or serenity.  The movement starts with arms slightly away from the body, palms up, then brings them together in a gesture of offering.  The final frame shows the hands slightly more together, emphasizing the protective nature of the hamsa.  The movement should be slow and deliberate to convey a sense of calm and intention. The two-joint system allows for a natural arc of movement.

frames.beat: arms open slightly, palms up, offering serenity
arms move closer, presenting the hamsa with gentle intention
hands meet, a gesture of protection and good fortune
